name: SQLite数据库操作
command:
/nsjail python3 << 'EOF'
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect('/data/test.db')
cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT)')
cursor.execute('INSERT INTO test (value) VALUES ("hello")')
conn.commit()
cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM test')
print(cursor.fetchall())
conn.close()
print('SQLite测试成功')
EOF
expected: 成功创建表、插入数据、查询，输出 SQLite测试成功

name: 文件大小限制-100MB
expected: 应该失败，提示 File size limit exceeded

name: 超时控制-5秒
expected: 应该在5秒左右超时终止，不输出 done
